title: forge.toml
description: Schema for forge.toml workspace and service configuration files (forge multi-service orchestration tool). Workspace files contain [workspace] sections; service files contain [service] sections.

workspace.description: Workspace-level metadata. Present only in the root forge.toml.

groups.description: Named groups of services (e.g. [groups.backend]). Used with 'fr up backend'.

commands.description: Workspace-level custom commands (e.g. [commands.migrate]). Run with 'fr migrate'.

service.description: Service configuration. Use [service] for a single service or [service.name] for multiple services in one file.

oneOf.description: Single-service config: [service] with direct fields like up, port, health, etc.
Multi-service config: [service.name] for each named service in this directory.

lib.description: Library marker. If present, this forge.toml file is a library and will not be treated as a service.

zones.description: Named scan zones mapping zone-name to directory path (relative to workspace root). Enables multi-root monorepos. E.g. zones = { apps = "apps", infra = "infra" }

ignore.description: Extra directory names or glob patterns to exclude from service discovery (appended to built-in defaults like node_modules, target, .git).

ignore_override.description: Completely override the default ignore list. Only the specified patterns will be excluded.

parallel_startup.description: Allow independent services to start in parallel during 'fr up' (default: true).

hints.description: Info panels displayed after 'fr up' and 'fr ps'. Useful for showing URLs, credentials, or notes.

env.description: Global environment variables inherited by all services. Service-level env overrides these.

title.description: Section title for this hint panel.

items.description: List of label-value pairs to display.

includes.description: Other group names to include in this group (group composition).

services.description: Explicit list of service names belonging to this group.

mode.description: Execution mode: 'direct' runs at workspace root, 'service' delegates to each service's own 'commands' entry. Default: 'service'.

run.description: Shell command to run (only used when mode = 'direct').

order.description: Execution order for service mode. Default: 'topological'.

fail_fast.description: Stop on first service failure. Default: true.

up.description: Shell command to start the service (e.g. 'cargo run', 'npm start'). Required for runnable services.

down.description: Shell command to stop the service gracefully. If omitted, forge sends SIGTERM/SIGKILL.

build.description: Build command for the service (e.g. 'cargo build --release'). Run with 'fr run build'.

dev.description: Development override command. When set, 'fr up' in dev mode uses this instead of 'up'.

logs.description: Command to tail logs for this service (used when the service manages its own log files).

port.description: Primary TCP port this service listens on. Used for port conflict detection and status display.

groups.description: Group names this service belongs to. Used with 'fr up <group>'.

depends_on.description: Services that must be started and healthy before this service starts.

health.description: Health check configuration. forge waits until healthy before starting dependents.

env.description: Environment variables for this service. Merged with (and override) workspace-level env.

env_file.description: Path to a .env file to load (relative to service directory or absolute). Loaded after workspace env, before service env.

cwd.description: Working directory for all commands (relative to service directory). Defaults to service directory.

args.description: Extra arguments appended to the 'up' command.

autorestart.description: Automatically restart the service if it exits unexpectedly. Default: true.

max_restarts.description: Maximum number of automatic restarts before giving up. Default: 10.

restart_delay.description: Seconds to wait between restart attempts. Default: 3.

kill_timeout.description: Seconds to wait for graceful shutdown before force-killing. Default: 10.

treekill.description: Kill the entire process group (all child processes) on stop. Default: true.

attach.description: Attach this service to the terminal by default during 'fr up' (foreground output). Default: false.

max_memory.description: Memory limit for the service process (e.g. '512M', '2G'). Service is restarted if exceeded.

mode.description: Process lifecycle mode. 'service' (default): long-running process, restarted on exit. 'oneshot': launcher exits immediately after starting an external daemon (e.g. docker compose up -d); forge keeps the service marked as running and relies on the health check.

commands.description: Custom commands for this service (e.g. [service.commands.migrate]). Run with 'fr run migrate'.

http.description: HTTP path to poll for health (e.g. '/health', '/healthz'). forge checks http://localhost:<port><path>. Must start with '/'.

cmd.description: Shell command or argv array to run as health check. Exit code 0 = healthy.

oneOf.description: Shell command (passed to sh -c). Supports pipes, env vars, etc.
Argv array executed directly (no shell). E.g. ["pg_isready", "-h", "localhost"].

interval.description: Seconds between health check attempts. Default: 2.

timeout.description: Total seconds to wait for the service to become healthy. Default: 60.

run.description: Shell command to execute for this custom command.

description.description: Human-readable description shown in command listings.

inputs.description: Glob patterns (relative to service directory) whose file contents determine the cache key. If set, forge skips re-running if inputs are unchanged.

outputs.description: Paths or globs produced by this command. Declarative metadata for documentation and future tooling.
